description: An employee is transferring to a new role in a different department.

nodes.task_description: Receive the approved transfer details (new role, department, manager, effective date).

expected_outcome.expected: HRBP receives all necessary information for the transfer.

nodes.task_description: Update the employee's record in the HRIS with the new position details.

expected_outcome.expected: HRBP successfully updates the employee's job information.

nodes.task_description: Generate a transfer confirmation letter for the employee.

expected_outcome.expected: HRBP creates and sends a letter confirming the details of the transfer.
